---
title: "xiexiyey"
---

Fit of a 1d function of n variables with errors on the "x" too

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`fit/xiexiyey.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/fit/xiexiyey.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `fit_xiexiyey` {#fit_xiexiyey}

```python
def fit_xiexiyey(ansatz, x: np.ndarray, ex: np.ndarray, y: np.ndarray, ey: np.ndarray, guess: np.ndarray, method='BFGS', Cov_inv=None)
```

Fit of y=f(ec{x}), there f: R^n        o R^1

Args:
    ansatz : ansatz taking a float and returning a float
    x (np.ndarray): 1d array of x values
    y (np.ndarray): 1d array of y values
    ey (np.ndarray):1d array of errors on the values
    guess (np.ndarray): 1d array fo guesses for the ansatz_
    maxiter (int, optional): _description_. Defaults to 10000.
    method (str, optional): _description_. Defaults to "BFGS".

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/fit/xiexiyey.py#L6){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
